title: PyPI Wheel Manifest
description: Defines Python packages to build as wheels. Combines base requirements from git repos with explicit extra packages.

version.description: Label for this wheel set (e.g., the primary application version). Used in S3 paths.

base_requirements.description: Map of git repo name to ref. The repo's requirements.txt at that ref is included in the wheel build.

packages.description: Python packages to build as wheels.

name.description: Package specifier as accepted by pip (e.g., 'boto3', 'social-auth-core[openidconnect]').

required_by.description: What this package is for (e.g., ['netbox']). Empty means general-purpose.

frozen.description: When true, this package cannot be edited or deleted.
When true, the entire manifest cannot be edited.
